vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a chronological audit of the provided image sequence. Initially, there was a single, struggling green stem visible in the P3/P4 pot. Over the course of the 5-day observation window, this specimen underwent rapid senescence and eventual disappearance. As of the current timestamp, all pots are devoid of plant life. The white rabbit anchor remains in P3, but the Pothos is gone. The biome is effectively non-functional.
